title: Lidz Ladies deny Southern Stars
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Southern Stars FC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Southern Stars FC women's team missed a golden chance to extend their lead at the top of the regional league standings after playing to a 2-2 draw against the Lidz Ladies FC on Saturday afternoon, 18 October.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Southern Stars FC women's team missed a golden chance to extend their lead at the top of the regional league standings after playing to a 2-2 draw against the Lidz Ladies FC on Saturday afternoon, 18 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The match was played at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zimi Gxagxa and Thimna Boyce were on target for the Knysna-based team, while Avuzwa Nkosana and Simanye Mto found the net for the Plettenberg Bay side.","html":"Zimi Gxagxa and Thimna Boyce were on target for the Knysna-based team, while Avuzwa Nkosana and Simanye Mto found the net for the Plettenberg Bay side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Stars started strong, with Boyce and Lizelle Kamfer combining well in midfield to set up Gxagxa's opener.","html":"Southern Stars started strong, with Boyce and Lizelle Kamfer combining well in midfield to set up Gxagxa's opener."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Nkosana equalised for Lidz just before half-time with a well-taken goal.","html":"However, Nkosana equalised for Lidz just before half-time with a well-taken goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the second half, Mto stunned the crowd with a brilliant free kick to give Lidz a 2-1 lead.","html":"In the second half, Mto stunned the crowd with a brilliant free kick to give Lidz a 2-1 lead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Stars fought back and were awarded a late penalty after a reckless challenge in the box. Boyce calmly converted, levelling the score.","html":"Southern Stars fought back and were awarded a late penalty after a reckless challenge in the box. Boyce calmly converted, levelling the score."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams now sit on 16 points, but Southern Stars lead the table with a superior goal difference, having scored 29 goals in six matches.","html":"Both teams now sit on 16 points, but Southern Stars lead the table with a superior goal difference, having scored 29 goals in six matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tournament organisers praised the high quality of play. With the play-offs fast approaching, both teams remain strong contenders for promotion.","html":"Tournament organisers praised the high quality of play. With the play-offs fast approaching, both teams remain strong contenders for promotion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
